Run a complete case-study pipeline in R

Source: R/case_study_pipeline.R
run_case_study.Rd

Run a complete case-study pipeline in R

Usage

run_case_study(
  expr,
  dataset_id,
  source,
  output_dir,
  metadata = NULL,
  mode = c("paper", "python_compat"),
  cgm_min_cluster_size = 30,
  fgm_min_cluster_size = 10,
  top_n_genes = 1200,
  seed = 42
)

Arguments

expr

Expression matrix (samples x genes).

dataset_id

Dataset id string.

source

Source description or URL.

output_dir

Output directory.

metadata

Optional sample metadata data.frame (rownames = sample ids).

mode

NestedWGCNA mode.

cgm_min_cluster_size

CGM minimum cluster size.

fgm_min_cluster_size

FGM minimum cluster size.

top_n_genes

Number of variable genes to keep.

seed

Random seed.

Value

Summary list (also written to summary.json).
